name: Griddle Flat Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together to form a dough.
2. Cut into 4 or 5 pieces.
3. Roll out thin to about an 8-inch circle.
4. Prick the top with a fork and bake in a hot oiled griddle or skillet.
5. Turn with a spatula, being careful not to burn as it cooks quickly.
6. Enjoy with sauteed greens such as escarole.
This recipe makes about 4 or 5 flatbreads measuring 8-10 inches in diameter.
